name: Karina  Martinez
ai_summary: Karina Martinez brings four years of early childhood education experience as a former assistant teacher and two years as a behavioral health technician working with children ages 3-8. Located in Tucson, AZ with 25-mile travel range, she is available for both full-time and part-time schedules and emphasizes passion, reliability, and child-centered approaches.
